risk_description: Distributed transaction failure during financial workflows (Stripe/Wise) leading to data inconsistency between Payment Service, Ledger, and Project status.
root_cause: Complexity of implementing the Saga Pattern across microservices without a dedicated orchestration engine.
mitigation_strategy: Implement rigorous idempotency keys for all financial API calls. utilize database transactions for local state updates before emitting events. Implement automated reconciliation jobs.
contingency_plan: Develop a manual 'Admin Override' interface to force-correct transaction states in the ledger based on external gateway data.
monitoring_trigger: Detection of 'orphan' transaction records or mismatch alerts between Stripe webhooks and internal ledger states.

risk_description: AI Hallucinations or extraction failures in SOW processing resulting in incorrect Project Brief data or missed requirements.
root_cause: Non-deterministic nature of LLMs (OpenAI) and variability in input document formats (PDF/Docx).
mitigation_strategy: Implement 'Human-in-the-Loop' review UI (WI-AI-003) as a mandatory gate. Use Zod schemas to strictly validate AI JSON output structure. Implement retry logic with temperature variation.
contingency_plan: Fallback to manual data entry mode if AI extraction fails repeatedly or confidence scores are low.
monitoring_trigger: Track the ratio of 'Admin Edits' to 'AI Extracted Fields' to measure model degradation or drift.

risk_description: Failure to adequately sanitize PII from uploaded SOW documents before storage or vendor matching, violating GDPR/Privacy requirements.
root_cause: Reliance on probabilistic AI models for PII detection which may miss edge cases in unstructured text.
mitigation_strategy: Implement a multi-pass sanitization pipeline: Regular Expression pre-processing for known patterns + AWS Comprehend/OpenAI PII detection + Admin review gate.
contingency_plan: Implement immediate 'Hard Delete' and 'Purge' functionality for S3 and Vector DB to remediate accidental leakage.
monitoring_trigger: Periodic audit sampling of 'Sanitized' documents in S3.

risk_description: EKS Cluster complexity and multi-AZ networking misconfiguration leading to deployment failures or higher latency.
root_cause: High complexity of configuring VPC CNI, OIDC providers, and Auto-scaling groups manually via Terraform.
mitigation_strategy: Use proven Terraform modules (e.g., terraform-aws-modules/eks). Implement GitOps (ArgoCD) for consistent deployment state management.
contingency_plan: Prepare a simplified single-AZ failover configuration if multi-AZ networking encounters blocking issues.
monitoring_trigger: Kube-state-metrics reporting nodes not ready or pod scheduling timeouts.

risk_description: AWS SES Sandbox restrictions or Domain Verification delays blocking critical transactional emails (Invoices, Invites).
root_cause: AWS requires a manual review process to move out of SES Sandbox, which can take days or be rejected.
mitigation_strategy: Initiate AWS SES production access request immediately. Implement a local mailer (Mailhog) for development to decouple progress.
contingency_plan: Setup SendGrid or Postmark as a backup email provider adapter within the Notification Service.
monitoring_trigger: SES Bounce rate monitoring and production access request status tracking.

risk_description: pgvector search performance degradation as the number of Vendor profiles and SOW embeddings grows.
root_cause: Vector search is computationally intensive; improper indexing (IVFFlat vs HNSW) affects recall and speed.
mitigation_strategy: Configure HNSW indexes for pgvector from day one. Implement caching for frequent recommendation queries.
contingency_plan: Migrate vector search workload to a dedicated Pinecone or Milvus instance if RDS CPU bottlenecks.
monitoring_trigger: RDS CPU utilization spikes during search queries > 70%.

risk_description: Accessibility compliance failure (WCAG 2.1 AA) requiring significant rework of UI components late in development.
root_cause: Complex interactive components (Radix UI) require strict ARIA management which is often overlooked by developers.
mitigation_strategy: Enforce eslint-plugin-jsx-a11y. Integrate Axe-core into CI/CD pipeline (Playwright). Use Radix UI primitives correctly.
contingency_plan: Schedule a dedicated 'Accessibility Sprint' prior to UAT to address audit findings.
monitoring_trigger: Lighthouse accessibility score dropping below 90 in CI builds.
